titleStmt.title: SII 5.447: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 447. (A.R. No. 155 of 1894). ON THE INSIDE OF THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭukoṇṭu muṭikoṇṭaco
ḻapurattu virāpiṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatiṉ
Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kiḻvempunāṭṭut tirunelveli naṭukkantavuttāṉ kulacekara
tevarukku yivvūr cuttavallipperunteruvil vāṇiyaṟkkuc camaiñca kāraṇavarom piṭipāṭu kuṭu
tta paricāvatu yivar Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉārukku cantirātittavaṟ celvutāka yivvāṭ
ṭaip puraṭṭātimāsa ttu Eḻāntiyatiyum tecamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ yiṭṭa tiru
nantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Aṉavaratāṉaṉāl Aḷappatāṉa Eṇṇai Uḻakku yivveṇṇai Uḻakkum can
tirātittavaṟ muṭṭuppaṭātapaṭi cella Aḷapputāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu paḻamutal Āṉai Accu 10 yiv
vaccup pattum pattukkaraiyilum kaik(k)koṇṭamaikkum yikkarai pattilum muṉpu nāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyārukku
viṭukiṟapaṭi Eṇṇai Uṭaṉe yivveṇṇai nāḷ Oṉṟukku Uḻakkākap paṭi Eṇṇai Uṭaṉe Aḷappomākavum yi
ppaṭi cantirātittavaṟ Aḷappomāka yivvaccup pattum kaikkoṇṭu kallilum cempilum veṭ
ṭikkoḷvatākap piṭipāṭu kuṭuttom naṭukkantavuttāṉ kulacekaratevarukku cuttavallipperunte
ruvil vāṇiyaṟkkuc camaiñca kāraṇavarom . Ivai mācilāmaṇi nampaṉāṉa taṉmapotiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
tevaṉ makiḻaṉāṉa nakaraceṉāpati Eḻuttu coṟaṉ kuruntaṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyavaṇikaiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
mācilāmaṇi piḷḷāṉāṉa kulacekarattaṉmapotiyarāyan Eḻuttu karuṇākaracempiyatevaṉāṉa kaṉakapotiyarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu caṅkaṉ Ammaiyāḻvāṉāṉa Āṉantakkūttaṉ Eḻuttu .—kilāraṉ kkaṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ
vattaraāyaṉ Eḻuttu .— nakkaṉ mācilāmaṇiyāṉa māpotiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉampalakūttaṉ ko
ṟṟaṉāṉa tiruvampalampiriyātāṉ Eḻuttu .— Eṟucevakaṉ paṭṭaṉāṉa pāṟpatipākaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.447 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
